evals.prompt: How do I implement circuit breaker in Spring Boot microservices?
evals.expected_output: Use Resilience4j (not Hystrix, which is deprecated). Configure @CircuitBreaker on service methods. Use fallback methods to return cached or default responses on failure.

evals.prompt: How do I communicate between Spring Boot microservices synchronously?
evals.expected_output: Use OpenFeign client for declarative REST calls. Or WebClient for reactive. Configure timeouts and circuit breakers. Use Spring Cloud LoadBalancer for client-side load balancing.

evals.prompt: How do I implement distributed tracing in Spring Boot microservices?
evals.expected_output: Use Micrometer Tracing with Zipkin or Jaeger. Include spring-boot-starter-actuator and micrometer-tracing. Propagate trace/span IDs across service calls automatically.

should_not_trigger: How do I implement gRPC in NestJS?
How do I set up Spring Security?
How do I implement microservices in Go?
